title: Commands Pack
description: A Modpack specifically made for the creation of Command block Contraptions
body:

# Commands Pack is a Modpack which focuses on Utility and Optimization.

---

## ![wrench](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vanilama-modded/Asset-hosting-Vanilama/57196184a802314ce916465f0630b57e77dd78d5/wrench.svg) Performance Issues?



If your Pc isnt very strong I **Recommend** you to disable Voxy in the Video Settings. 
And dont use Shaders, I know they look nice but if your Pc isnt strong enough than don't use them.

---

## What makes Commands Pack Special?

![arrow-right](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Vanilama-modded/Asset-hosting-Vanilama/c3047337eb0e0296ede1de5c494a8210c879851c/arrow-right.svg) Commands Pack is very well optimized through the use of mods like:
  - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI)
  - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB)
  - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs)
  - and more
 
- Commands Pack offers many useful features like:
  - Better Book Writing with [Scholar](https://modrinth.com/mod/fX4dIQCo)
  - [Better Command block Ui](https://modrinth.com/mod/8iQcgjQ2)
  - Command Autocomplete Suggestions with [Better Autocomplete](https://modrinth.com/mod/spH6Zk6U)
  - Host Your World so others can join with [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/qANg5Jrr)
  - and many more Useful mods you didn't know you needed.

---
